name: Intellicheck, Inc.
summary: Intellicheck, Inc. is a technology company delivering on-demand digital identity validation solutions for Know Your Customer (KYC) fraud prevention and age verification. The company validates digital and physical identities for financial services, fintech, BNPL providers, e-commerce, retail, law enforcement, and government agencies across North America. Products include IDN-Mobile, IDN-Portal, IDN-Direct, and IDN-Capture, delivered primarily as SaaS through mobile devices, browsers, and retail point-of-sale scanners.
